calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73275187/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73275187/record/snapshots/2026-07-13.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73275187/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73275187/record/documents/*.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|case law|opinion|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '524 U.S. 321' --citation '586 U.S. 146' --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],q:"\"Excessive Fines Clause\" OR Bajakajian",filed_after:"2026-06-01",filed_before:"2026-06-26",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"dateFiled desc"}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:["scotus"],case_name:"Pung v. [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }
